note: Surface-completeness triage for the Lido stETH implementation (called via the AppProxyUpgradeable proxy 0xae7ab9..fe84). EVERY external-mutating selector in the snapshot has an explicit cover|exclude (gate I1). ERC20+EIP-2612 standard funcs are exclude — covered by the erc20 standard adapter via tokens:erc20 auto-enumerate (Curve precedent). Lido-specific user surface = submit (stake), transferShares/transferSharesFrom (shares-denominated transfer), and the selector-less bare-ETH stake via the payable fallback (0x00000000 native-transfer sentinel, grounded by the snapshot's fallback entry).

0xa1903eab.name: submit
0xa1903eab.reason: LIQUID-STAKING deposit — user sends ETH (msg.value) and receives stETH; the core Lido user action. New liquid_staking domain (Tier 3).

0x8fcb4e5b.name: transferShares
0x8fcb4e5b.reason: shares-denominated stETH transfer (rebasing-token internal unit); a user fund-move whose amount is shares, not stETH — not faithfully expressible as plain erc20_transfer.

0x6d780459.name: transferSharesFrom
0x6d780459.reason: shares-denominated transferFrom (spends allowance); same rationale as transferShares.

0x00000000.name: fallback (bare-ETH stake)
0x00000000.reason: SELECTOR-LESS native-ETH stake — sending ETH with EMPTY calldata hits Lido's payable fallback() (NON_EMPTY_DATA-guarded: requires msg.data.length==0), which calls _submit(0) and mints stETH to the sender. No 4-byte selector → routed under the reserved 0x00000000 native-transfer sentinel; grounded by the snapshot's payable fallback entry. Decoded as liquid_staking.stake (amount=$tx.value). Manifest: lido/steth/stake-eth.

0x095ea7b3.name: approve
0x095ea7b3.reason: standard ERC20 approve on stETH — analyzed by the erc20 standard adapter (tokens:erc20 auto-enumerate); not a Lido-specific primitive.

0xa9059cbb.name: transfer
0xa9059cbb.reason: standard ERC20 transfer — erc20 standard adapter.

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom
0x23b872dd.reason: standard ERC20 transferFrom — erc20 standard adapter.

0xd505accf.name: permit
0xd505accf.reason: EIP-2612 permit — standard off-chain allowance grant, handled by the erc20 standard (ERC-2612) path; not Lido-specific.

0x39509351.name: increaseAllowance
0x39509351.reason: OZ ERC20 allowance helper — erc20 standard adapter.

0xa457c2d7.name: decreaseAllowance
0xa457c2d7.reason: OZ ERC20 allowance helper — erc20 standard adapter.

0x2cb5f784.name: setStakingLimit
0x2cb5f784.reason: governance — StakingControlRole sets the daily stake limit.

0xb3320d9a.name: removeStakingLimit
0xb3320d9a.reason: governance — StakingControlRole removes the stake limit.

0x38998624.name: unsafeChangeDepositedValidators
0x38998624.reason: governance — emergency role; not a wallet action.

0x528c198a.name: mintShares
0x528c198a.reason: core/role — only Lido core (Burner/Accounting) mints shares.

0x853c637d.name: burnShares
0x853c637d.reason: core/role — Burner burns shares; not a user call.

0x1b250097.name: emitTokenRebase
0x1b250097.reason: accounting/role — emits rebase event during oracle report.

0x9271e3e6.name: collectRewardsAndProcessWithdrawals
0x9271e3e6.reason: core/role — Accounting handler during oracle report.

0x4ad509b2.name: receiveELRewards
0x4ad509b2.reason: infra — only the EL rewards vault sends rewards (payable).

0x78ffcfe2.name: receiveWithdrawals
0x78ffcfe2.reason: infra — only the withdrawal vault sends ETH (payable).

0xaa0b7db7.name: deposit
0xaa0b7db7.reason: keeper — DepositSecurityModule deposits buffered ETH to validators; not a user call.

0x9d4941d8.name: transferToVault
0x9d4941d8.reason: deprecated/admin — recovers tokens to the treasury.
